description: RepSaga RPG character-level title ladder (8 entries: 7 v1 strength-era + Phase 38f saga_unending@172, the cardio-inclusive level cap). Spec §10.2. Slugs are stable join keys — `earned_titles.title_id` references this list. Display copy lives in `lib/l10n/app_en.arb` + `app_pt.arb` keyed by `title_{slug}_name` and `title_{slug}_flavor`. Awarded when `character_state.character_level` crosses `level_threshold` in the half-open interval `(oldLevel, newLevel]`.
